view.emailDisabled: Yer message bottle ({email}) has been disabled. Please contact
view.allowServerAccess: Allow InterServer to modify yer ship:
view.ipHelpText: If the boarding be coming from different Ship's Coordinates. Kindly change it.

new.title: Lodge New Grievance
new.subject: Subject
new.subjectValidation: Please enter a short description of the trouble, matey.
new.descriptionPlaceholder: The Captain thanks ye for keeping the support waters shipshape by submitting one grievance per ticket.
new.descriptionValidation: Please enter a detailed description of the trouble.
new.fileNote: Note: Only image files - gif/jpeg/png types are allowed.
new.allowAccessLabel: I allow InterServer to board my ship and perform modifications
new.accessNote: Please note: By lodging a support grievance, InterServer may need to board, debug, or modify files in yer account. This requirement be needed in order to provide technical support. Please only continue if ye agree.
